name: rei-freeze-threat
prompt: Close-up. Silver-haired woman, ice-blue eyes fierce, cold intensifying — frost spreading on earring, visible breath. Threat in her expression. Ice-cold lighting, blue dominant. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting, high contrast, MAPPA studio style

dialogue.speaker: Rei
dialogue.text: Then you know I can freeze you where you stand.

name: kade-closer
prompt: Close-up. Dark-haired young man in dim storage room, amber eyes warm and challenging, slight smile. Heat shimmer intensifying. Unfazed by threat. Moving closer. Concrete walls and metal shelving behind him. Warm amber lighting. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting, high contrast, MAPPA studio style

name: rei-composure
prompt: Medium close-up. Silver-haired woman, composure straining — eyes flickering with something beneath the ice. Controlling reaction. Conflict visible. Cold blue lighting warring with warm. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting, high contrast, MAPPA studio style

dialogue.speaker: Rei
dialogue.text: You don't know what I'll do.

name: kade-sees-her
prompt: Close-up. Dark-haired young man in dim storage room, amber eyes soft but intense, expression knowing. Voice rough and warm. Seeing through her. Concrete wall behind him. Warm amber lighting, intimate. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting, high contrast, MAPPA studio style

dialogue.speaker: Kade
dialogue.text: I know you're hiding. I know that redhead's been touching you all morning and your cold keeps pushing her away. I know you came here to feel something other than hunted.
